summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PaisaPe V2 features - 25/25 backend tests passed, all frontend UI features working. Key new features validated: wallet balance in user management, ledger view dialog, live transactions page with auto-refresh/filter/search/detail modal, test API with mobile/operator/amount params, retailer reports with transactions+ledger tabs, user settings page, recharge amount validation fix.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> inside <span> in tbody - not critical but causes console warnings. This is caused by dynamic array rendering wrapping elements.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React hydration warnings in tables due to dynamic rendering wrapper in tbody - functional but generates console warnings. Consider using React.Fragment instead of span for array renders.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data - 4 users, operators, 1 API config. Additional recharge transactions created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V2 features tested and working. New endpoints validated: GET /wallet/all, GET /wallet/user/:userId, GET /wallet/user/:userId/ledger, POST /api-config/:id/test. Recharge DTO accepts amount as string (converts to number via @Type decorator). API config supports stockxchange format (GET query params) and MoneyArt format (POST JSON with headers). Recharge provider API calls remain MOCKED (simulated).

tested_features.admin_sidebar_8_items: PASSED - Dashboard, Users, Operators, API Config, Commission, Routing, Transactions, Reports
tested_features.user_management_ledger_dialog: PASSED - Account Ledger dialog opens with Date, Remark, Debit, Credit, Balance columns
tested_features.manual_wallet_credit: PASSED - Dialog has Amount, Type (credit/debit), Submit button
tested_features.live_transactions_page: PASSED - Auto-refresh toggle, status filter, search, transaction detail modal
tested_features.api_config_test_dialog: PASSED - Mobile/Operator/Amount inputs, generates request preview with Full URL, Parameters, Response Field Mapping
tested_features.retailer_reports_page: PASSED - Transactions tab and Wallet Ledger tab working
tested_features.retailer_settings_page: PASSED - Profile Information, KYC Status, Change Password sections
tested_features.recharge_amount_validation: PASSED - Amount as string accepted without validation error, recharge successful
tested_features.backend_wallet_all_endpoint: PASSED - GET /api/wallet/all returns all wallets with balances

mocked_apis.note: Recharge provider API calls are MOCKED using simulateApiCall method. Test API endpoint only generates request preview, no live call is made.
